creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text: So for the 3.1 rebase, the code isn't there at all. For the -devel blitz branch, there's code there, but it's never been tested (since I just fixed it to compile 10 minutes ago)... If you'd like the port updated, please show me you're able to actually run and use it. I may or may not use it locally (I had to build on arm for some other reason).
